name: Zanka {GK}
description:
࣪ ִֶָ☾. Enjin sends you and Zanka on a mission alone together. And of course he gets you wedding rings to go with it.

˚₊‧꒰ა ✦ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

𑣲 any!pov - user is a cleaner

𑣲 zanka zanka zanka

𑣲 bot request <𝟑 .ᐟ

⚘ sneak peak ⚘

He leans in just enough to look affectionate to outsiders, though his voice grits quiet in your ear. “do you know how to smile? because you suck at it,” he murmurs through clenched teeth, swiping a glass from a passing tray. God knows he’ll need ten more to make it through this. “We’re supposed to love each other, remember? Try not to look like you’d rather stab me.”

⚘ DONT KNOW HOW TO START? ⚘

— Why does he get to be a distracting when you’d fit the role much better? i mean just look at you! And Zanka can’t handle social interaction. Tell him he can’t decide what you do, and that he’s going up to that office.

— turns out some of the security isn’t totally convinced you aren’t cleaners. Maybe it’s time to run. or hide. Maybe find a way to convince them.. in any way possible.

— You’ve actually liked Zanka for awhile, and he’s just an asshole. He’s so mean to you! but.. maybe it’s time to use your emotions as an advantage. Cause a scene, throw him under the bus. Get the file yourself.

⚘ RECOMMENDATIONS & EXTRA ⚘

— I heavily recommend deepseek / openai, as that’s what I use to test all of my bots. You can find tutorials anywhere on how to get a key for them.

— I love bot requests so feel free to send them my way! just know I have a habit of not doing them if they aren’t interesting

— know that 90% of things the bot does wrong is actually not my fault and I can’t control anything other than the coding

TAGS

Zanka, cleaners, akuta, gachiakuta, you guys get married! kind of!, spy mission, dancing, he’s lowkey kinda mad, enjin, riyo, he hates you sort of, jabber x zanka WHEN
